completedImprovements.title: Validation stale banner client-side age check fix
completedImprovements.evidence: Production deployment dpl_2NRUYUW9pVmFKYVk6wJCycBpDrem for commit 64f6b521b reached READY after moving Date.now()-based snapshot age calculation out of the server prerender path, and /validation rendered without a false stale banner for the fresh deployed snapshot.

notes: Verified the latest production deployment for commit 64f6b521b is READY and promoted to openmanager-ai.vercel.app after the previous server-prerender Date.now() build failure was removed.
Verified the /validation page renders badge values from the deployed snapshot and does not show the amber stale warning when the snapshot is still fresh.
Verified the Public snapshot JSON CTA remains present on the page; this run focused on the page rendering contract rather than re-fetching the JSON endpoint payload itself.
